title: TRANSGENDER HEALTH PROGRAM - 211info
text: OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT TRANSGENDER HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical services for people seeking gender transition-related care. Services include education and preparation for transgender medical services, clinician referrals, and specialized information and referral for transgender issues. Medical services provided include hormone therapy, fertility services, laser hair removal, and surgeries for face, chest, and sexual organs. Also offers education, training, and advocacy for transgender health issues within the OHSU community. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Age 18 and older seeking gender transition-related care Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 494-7970 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 494-7970 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 9, 12, 35, and 40 Services: Personal Health Care Advocate Services * Transgender Individuals Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MINORITY AIDS INITIATIVE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARTNERSHIP PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
